package rulefixtures

import (
	"context"
)

// scenario for middleware_writes_business_response_payloads: Middleware that emits domain success payloads instead of leaving response bodies to handlers or render helpers.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: architecture; severity: info.
type Rule093NegativeRecord struct {
	TenantID string
	Limit int
}

type Rule093NegativeService interface {
	Run(context.Context, Rule093NegativeRecord) error
}

func scenario093Negative(ctx context.Context, service Rule093NegativeService, input Rule093NegativeRecord) error {
	if input.Limit <= 0 {
		input.Limit = 50
	}
	return service.Run(ctx, input)
}
